use_cases: Displaying user login frequency metrics in admin dashboards
Tracking successful sign-in patterns across regions for security monitoring
Visualizing recent user activity in SaaS platform analytics sections
Showing login trends in developer console or user management interfaces
Monitoring user engagement metrics in fintech security dashboards
ai_summary: A login activity visualization component that displays recent successful sign-ins as an animated bar chart with 10 data points. The card features gradient-colored bars that animate on mount with staggered delays, and a subtle glow effect activates on hover. Supports both light and dark themes with clean typography, making it ideal for security dashboards, admin panels, and user analytics sections in SaaS applications.
